DisplayName: Windows - Company Portal - On Demand Install
Description: Detects whether Microsoft Company Portal (Microsoft.CompanyPortal) is installed on the device and reinstalls it on demand if a previous deployment has failed or the app is missing. Runs silently in SYSTEM context, downloads the current installer from Microsoft's official source, and writes a timestamped log to C:\Temp\ for auditing. Idempotent — takes no action if Company Portal is already present. Returns exit code 0 (already installed / compliant) or 1 (reinstalled / remediated).
